zh.lifeSummary: 當John Stewart 1st Earl of Angus於大約1294年出生在英國蘇格蘭貝維其可爾布可爾時，他的父親Sir Alexander Stewart of Bonkyll24歲，母親Jean FitzJames25歲。他於1328年10月24日與Margaret de Abernethy在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1331年12月9日在英國蘇格蘭安格斯享年38歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Stewart 1st Earl of Angus于大约1294年出生在英国苏格兰貝維其可爾布可爾时，他的父亲Sir Alexander Stewart of Bonkyll24岁，母亲Jean FitzJames25岁。他于1328年10月24日与Margaret de Abernethy在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1331年12月9日在英国苏格兰安格斯享年38岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Stewart 1st Earl of Angus was born about 1294, in Bunkle, Berwickshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Alexander Stewart of Bonkyll, was 24 and his mother, Jean FitzJames, was 25. He married Margaret de Abernethy on 24 October 1328, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 9 December 1331, in Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 38, and was buried in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Stewart 1st Earl of Angus est né environ 1294, à Bunkle, Berwickshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Alexander Stewart of Bonkyll, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Jean FitzJames, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Abernethy le 24 octobre 1328, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 9 décembre 1331, à Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Stewart 1st Earl of Angus um 1294 in Bunkle, Berwickshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alexander Stewart of Bonkyll 24 und seine Mutter Jean FitzJames 25. Er hat am 24. Oktober 1328 in Scotland Margaret de Abernethy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 9. Dezember 1331 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Stewart 1st Earl of Angus è nato il circa 1294 nel Bunkle, Berwickshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Alexander Stewart of Bonkyll, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Jean FitzJames, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Abernethy il 24 ottobre 1328, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 9 dicembre 1331, nel Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Stewart 1st Earl of Angusが約1294年にイギリススコットランドバーウィクシュアイアブンクルで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander Stewart of Bonkyllは24歳，母Jean FitzJamesは25歳であった。1328年10月24日にスコットランドでMargaret de Abernethyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1331年12月9日にイギリススコットランドアンガスで38歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Stewart 1st Earl of Angus(이)가 대략 1294년 영국 스코틀랜드 버윅실르 버클에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alexander Stewart of Bonkyll(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Jean FitzJames(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1328년 10월 24일 스컷랜드에서 Margaret de Abernethy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1331년 12월 9일 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Stewart 1st Earl of Angus nasceu aproximadamente 1294, em Bunkle, Berwickshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Alexander Stewart of Bonkyll, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Jean FitzJames, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Abernethy em 24 de outubro de 1328, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 9 de dezembro de 1331, em Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Stewart 1st Earl of Angus родился около 1294 г. в местности бункл, бирвиккшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Alexander Stewart of Bonkyll было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Jean FitzJames, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Abernethy 24 октября 1328 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 9 декабря 1331 г. в местности ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Stewart 1st Earl of Angus nació aproximadamente 1294, en Bunkle, Berwickshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Alexander Stewart of Bonkyll, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Jean FitzJames, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Margaret de Abernethy el 24 de octubre de 1328, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 9 de diciembre de 1331, en Angus, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Escocia, Reino Unido.
